name: studio.create_redirect
description: Create a URL redirect on an Actium Studio site. Supports 301/302/307/308 status codes.
whenToUse: Slug change: old URL must 301-redirect to the new one; pair with studio.update_page or update_site for the rename.
Campaign vanity URL: create a short /promo redirect pointing at a longer landing-page URL.
External-partner migration: redirect legacy paths inherited from an old site to their new locations.
whenNotToUse: A redirect with the same source path already exists — call studio.list_redirects first; duplicates return 409.
Source or destination introduces a redirect loop (source == destination, or destination maps back to source) — pre-validate before calling.
Caller wants to serve different content at the same URL — use studio.update_page; redirects change location, not content.
